d: Kruger launches a mighty slash to knock down an enemy for [[1.5]]s, dealing [[450%]]<ATK> damage and inflicting them with [[3]] stacks of Shatter Armor. Each stack reduces the target's Phys DEF by [[10%]], up to [[4]] stacks on a target.
If Kruger is present, the ally inflicts enemies with an extra stack of Shatter Armor when reducing their Phys DEF.
Kruger slashes an enemy, dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage and inflicting them with a stack of Shatter Armor.

Kruger launches a powerful attack on adjacent enemies with at least [[4]] stacks of Shatter Armor and not affected by Vulnerable, dealing [[400%]]<ATK> damage and inflicting Vulnerable. For Vulnerable enemies, their physical damage taken is increased by [[40%]], and [[40%]] of their damage taken is transformed to Kruger's HP.
Increases Ranged DEF by [[16]] during battle.
Increases Ranged DEF by [[21]] during battle.
Increases Ranged DEF by [[26]] during battle.

When a battle starts, Kruger gains a shield that blocks damage equal to [[40%]]<HP> for [[15]]s if no allies are present within the surrounding [[1]] tile. The shield also grants him control immunity. Additionally, Kruger gains [[30]] Life Drain when no allies are detected within the surrounding [[1]] tile.
Removes the distance limit for Vital Strike (the other restrictions remain). Kruger can rush to Vulnerable enemies and cast Vital Strike to deal damage.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Life Drain, 13 Ranged DEF.

d: Kruger gains a [[40%]] ATK boost until the battle ends when a Vulnerable enemy is defeated by Vital Strike, stacking up to [[2]] stacks.
